title: MOTCraft server
description: MOTCraft has tech, magic, and shaders with mods to help performance
body:
MOTCraft has tech, magic, and shaders with mods to help performance

- Explore all the new structures and dimensions!
- Discover powerful equipment and relics!
- Dive into a world of magic and technology!
- Build bigger with countless new blocks!
# **Features**
- Automation - Create factories with Create and Create addons
- Exploration - Explore easir with Backpacks and comforts mod
- Food - Many more food options with Farmer's Delight, Expanded Delight, and many addons
- Building - More building options with Copycats+
- New Structures - Many new structures with Towns and Towers, Villages & Pillages, and many YUNG's better mods
